name: random_number_generator
description: Seeded RNG service for deterministic random integers/floats and random array sampling. Useful for test data generation, simulations, lottery/raffle draws, and reproducible automation workflows.

min.description: Lower bound (>=0). Integer for int mode

max.description: Upper bound. For int: < Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER; for float: < Number.MAX_VALUE

count.description: How many items to sample (<= items.length)
